enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates joy and energy, encouraging listeners to embrace life with enthusiasm.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Veera Sivaji, the song is performed during a lively celebration, showcasing the characters' happiness and camaraderie.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features vocals by STR and Maria Roe Vincent.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Thaarumaaru ThakkaliSoru was composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 14, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thaarumaaru ThakkaliSoru, the vibrant beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song is a highlight in Veera Sivaji, showcasing the characters' exuberance during a festive moment. It conveys a sense of happiness and energy, inviting listeners to dance and enjoy life. The collaboration of STR and Maria Roe Vincent brings a unique charm, making it an unforgettable track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thaarumaaru ThakkaliSoru from Veera Sivaji is an electrifying dance number that perfectly captures the festive spirit. With D Imman's vibrant music and catchy lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet. The collaboration between STR and Maria Roe Vincent adds a unique flair, making it a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Fresh tomato rice, fresh tomato rice, fresh tomato rice.

If you dance, it feels good, you were born for me.
I am the one who will take care of you.
White wine, you make me feel good.

With a smile, if you walk in style, if you listen to the music, you will feel the coolness of the sun.

Will she be my first love? It's just a feeling.
